comment: This file is a template and guide to configure EMQX 5.x Rule Engine to forward raw MQTT energy data into InfluxDB v3.

rule.sql:
SELECT
  payload.machine_id as machine_id,
  payload.location as location,
  payload.timestamp as timestamp,
  payload.power_kw as power_kw,
  payload.energy_kwh as energy_kwh,
  payload.voltage_v as voltage_v,
  payload.current_a as current_a,
  payload.power_factor as power_factor
FROM
  "factory/+/+/energy"
rule.description: Rule to parse manufacturing energy data and route to InfluxDB v3
